3065350.name: 7.7 Gate
3065350.description:
Gate Of Hell Has Open!
The 7 Arch Demon have been summoned and humanity are on the brink of destruction.
You have been chosen by the God to save humanity.

Create Your Own Legends
All the decision that you do will affect the fate of humanity.

Explore
There are tons of places with eye catching views that are ready to be explore! Save humanity from the Demon attack on your journey.

Story
Exciting Story awaits you! Uncover the mastermind behind the demons attack.

Weapons
There are tons of weapons that can be looted by defeating the 7 deadly sins and its supporter.

Skills
There are tons of skills that can be unlock and upgrade along your journey.
3065350.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
